title: Privacy statement
section1Body: Welcome to [www.tanzanite.site]. We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your data when you visit our website [www.tanzanite.site] and use our services.
section2Intro: We may collect the following types of personal information:
contactDesc: Email address, phone number, shipping/billing address
transactionDesc: Purchase history, payment details (processed via secure third-party gateways)
technicalDesc: IP address, browser type, device information, cookies
useManageAccount: Manage your account and provide customer support
useImproveSite: Improve website functionality and user experience
section4Intro: We may share your information with:
shareServiceProviders: Service Providers: Payment processors, logistics partners, analytics tools
shareLegalAuthorities: Legal Authorities: When required by law or to protect our rights
shareBusinessTransfers: Business Transfers: In case of merger, acquisition, or asset sale
shareNoSale: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
section5Intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
cookiesSettings: You can manage cookie settings in your browser.
section6Body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
section7Intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:
rightsAccess: Access, correct, or delete your personal data
rightsContact: To exercise these rights, please contact us.
section8Body: If you are located outside [Your Country], your data may be transferred to and processed in [Your Country], where data protection laws may differ.
section9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
